task_completion.description: Verify that a new folder named 'Archive-Backlog' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email client's folder pane shows a folder explicitly named 'Archive-Backlog'.

task_completion.description: Verify that emails have been moved to the 'Archive-Backlog' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Archive-Backlog' folder is selected and shows a large number of emails (47) inside its message list, or the unread/total count next to the folder indicates the emails were moved.

task_completion.description: Verify that exactly three emails remain in the Inbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Inbox folder is selected and the message list displays exactly three emails.

task_completion.description: Verify that the three emails remaining in the Inbox are flagged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The three emails visible in the Inbox have a flag, star, or similar indicator activated next to them in the message list.

task_completion.description: Verify that an email is addressed to 'assistant@company.com' with the subject 'Inbox Bankruptcy Status'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email composition window (or an email in the Sent folder) shows 'assistant@company.com' in the 'To' field and 'Inbox Bankruptcy Status' in the 'Subject' field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the body of the status email contains the correct count of archived emails.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email composition window (or Sent email) shows the number '47' in the message body.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual email client GUI rather than terminal commands or scripts to manipulate emails.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the email client interface (e.g., Thunderbird) being interacted with, not a terminal window executing mail commands or bash scripts.

integrity.description: The status email was composed in the email client's composition window.
integrity.visual_evidence: The email to assistant@company.com is seen in the email client's native 'Write' or 'Compose' window, not in a generic text editor like gedit or nano.

integrity.description: The inbox and folder states are genuinely manipulated within the email client.
integrity.visual_evidence: The folder pane and message lists are part of the email client's native UI, without signs of HTML editing, mockups, or text files masquerading as the email client.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task starts with exactly 50 emails in the Inbox. The agent must retain exactly 3 emails in the Inbox and move the remaining 47 to the 'Archive-Backlog' folder. The status email sent to 'assistant@company.com' must contain the exact number '47' in its body.
